title: NOAA Estuaries
description: A NOAA source card about estuaries, watersheds, habitats, and coastal ecosystems.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA estuary resources explain places where rivers meet the sea, including salinity, habitats, nurseries, wetlands, water quality, and human uses.
Use this source for systems reading about watersheds, coasts, food webs, and environmental monitoring.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
